Speaker 1: Hey.
dude: What are you doing?
Speaker 1: Nothing.
dude: You built a fort didn't ya?
Speaker 1: Kinda.
dude: Oh my God, the air purifier! Ross's air purifier! All I heard through 4 years of college was.
Speaker 1: Dude, you should've gone out once and a while.
dude: I hate this thing!
Speaker 1: Come on, Chandler, Ross is our friend. He needs us right now, so why don't you be a grown up and come and watch some TV in the fort!
